objectives.title: Main Objective
objectives.description: To design and develop an integrated AI-driven Smart Museum Guide system that enhances visitor engagement, accessibility, and personalization through QR-based artifact access, intelligent recommendations, interactive visualization, adaptive indoor navigation, and emotion-aware feedback mechanisms for the Colombo National Museum.

objectives.title: QR-Based Artifact Access System
objectives.description: To develop a QR-based artifact access system that enables visitors to retrieve digital information of museum artifacts through unique QR codes linked to a centralized backend system.

objectives.title: Role-Based Personalized Content Delivery
objectives.description: To design a role-based personalized content delivery mechanism that adapts artifact descriptions according to visitor categories such as tourist, student, teacher, professor, and citizen.

objectives.title: Multilingual Translation Module
objectives.description: To implement a multilingual translation module using NLP-based APIs to provide real-time translation of artifact descriptions into multiple languages, improving accessibility for diverse users.

objectives.title: AI-Driven Artifact Classification and Recommendation
objectives.description: To develop an AI-driven artifact classification and recommendation system using a MobileNetV2-based model to classify artifacts and suggest related exhibits and hidden gems based on user interaction and metadata.

objectives.title: Interactive 2D and 3D Artifact Visualization
objectives.description: To design and integrate an interactive 2D and 3D artifact visualization system using deep learning-based reconstruction and generative models to enhance artifact accessibility without physical interaction.

objectives.title: Adaptive Indoor Navigation System
objectives.description: To develop an adaptive indoor navigation system using BLE beacon positioning, sensor data, and GIS-based mapping to provide dynamic and context-aware route optimization inside the museum.

objectives.title: Emotion-Based Feedback and Chatbot System
objectives.description: To implement an emotion-based feedback and chatbot system that captures facial and vocal expressions to analyze visitor emotions and provide multilingual conversational support using AI-based models.

objectives.title: Unified Mobile Application and Backend Architecture
objectives.description: To integrate all components into a unified mobile application and backend architecture to ensure seamless interaction, scalability, and real-time data processing for smart museum operations.
